name: Rice Ole'
recipeIngredient: 14 1/2 oz Can peeled whole tomatoes - chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine onions, peppers, celery, and butter in a 2-1/2-quart microproof baking dish.
2. Cover and cook on HIGH (maximum power) for 6 minutes.
3. Add seasonings, tomatoes, and rice; stir. Cover and cook on HIGH for 4 minutes.
4. Let stand for 5 minutes.
Each serving provides:
128 calories
2.6 g. protein
2.4 g. fat
24.1 g. carbohydrate
489 mg. sodium
5 mg. cholesterol
Source: MICROCOOKING WITH RICE
